scripts.build: node ./scripts/run-with-project-node.cjs pnpm exec turbo run build
scripts.clean:workspaces: node ./scripts/run-with-project-node.cjs pnpm exec turbo run clean
scripts.dev: node ./scripts/run-with-project-node.cjs pnpm exec turbo watch dev --continue
scripts.format: node ./scripts/run-with-project-node.cjs pnpm exec turbo run format --continue -- --cache --cache-location .cache/.prettiercache
scripts.format:fix: node ./scripts/run-with-project-node.cjs pnpm exec turbo run format --continue -- --write --cache --cache-location .cache/.prettiercache
scripts.lint: node ./scripts/run-with-project-node.cjs pnpm exec turbo run lint --continue --filter="./packages/*" -- --cache --cache-location .cache/.eslintcache
scripts.test: node ./scripts/run-with-project-node.cjs pnpm exec turbo run test --continue --filter="./packages/*"
scripts.lint:fix: node ./scripts/run-with-project-node.cjs pnpm exec turbo run lint --continue -- --fix --cache --cache-location .cache/.eslintcache
scripts.typecheck: node ./scripts/run-with-project-node.cjs pnpm exec turbo run typecheck --filter="./packages/*"
